Name: SWEC iEEG Dataset
Acknowledgements: Intracranial EEG recorded at the Sleep-Wake-Epilepsy-Center (SWEC), Department of Neurology, Inselspital, University of Bern, in collaboration with the Integrated Systems Laboratory, ETH Zurich. Seizure onsets/offsets were annotated by board-certified epileptologist Prof. Kaspar Schindler.
HowToAcknowledge: Please cite Carzaniga, Hersche, Sebastian, Schindler & Rahimi, 'A foundation model with multi-variate parallel attention to generate neuronal activity', arXiv:2506.20354 (2025), and the SWEC-ETHZ iEEG Database (http://ieeg-swez.ethz.ch/).

GeneratedBy.Name: swec-bids-converter
GeneratedBy.Description: Streaming HDF5 (data/ieeg, µV) -> BrainVision BIDS conversion; channels indexed in original order, seizures mapped to events, electrodes n/a (anonymized).
